hyperedges.label: Server-side Stock Data Fetch & Technical Computation

nodes.label: middleware.ts
nodes.summary: Next.js middleware: creates server Supabase client, reads session JWT locally, protects /dashboard routes (redirects to /sign-in), redirects logged-in users from /sign-in to /dashboard, and handles legacy route redirects.

nodes.label: tsconfig.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript config: strict mode, ES2017 target, bundler module resolution, paths aliases @/* and @signal/ui + @signal/api-client for monorepo packages.

nodes.label: About Page
nodes.summary: Public about/story page for SignalGenie; renders founders, stats, timeline, mission and contact cards using PublicNav.

nodes.label: Admin Page
nodes.summary: Founder-only admin console that fetches /api/admin/stats and renders user table with plan distribution, invested totals, and KPIs.

nodes.label: Algo Builder Page
nodes.summary: 4-step strategy builder UI (Strategy Type → Indicators → Conditions → Backtest). Gated by ProGate feature='algo-builder'. Generates sample Python code; links to paper trading.

nodes.label: GET /api/admin/stats
nodes.summary: Nodejs route restricted to FOUNDERS; uses Supabase service role to aggregate all users, portfolios, holdings, equity grants into admin summary.

nodes.label: POST /api/broker/angel/connect
nodes.summary: Authenticates user with Angel One SmartAPI via clientcode/password/TOTP, encrypts JWT with AES-256-GCM, upserts into angel_connections Supabase table.

nodes.label: DELETE /api/broker/angel/disconnect
nodes.summary: Removes Angel One connection, deletes synced holdings and portfolio from Supabase using service role key.

nodes.label: POST /api/broker/angel/sync
nodes.summary: Decrypts stored JWT, fetches holdings from Angel One SmartAPI, maps to holdings schema, upserts into Supabase under 'Angel One' portfolio.

nodes.label: GET /api/casparser/connect
nodes.summary: Edge route that calls CASParser inbox OAuth flow to get an OAuth URL for connecting email inbox for CAS statement retrieval.

nodes.label: POST /api/casparser/files
nodes.summary: Edge route that calls CASParser v4 inbox API with inbox_token to list available CAS PDF files.

nodes.label: POST /api/casparser/parse
nodes.summary: Edge route that calls CASParser v4 smart/parse with a PDF URL and PAN as password; returns normalized MF holdings array.

nodes.label: GET /api/chart-data
nodes.summary: Edge route fetching OHLCV candlestick data from Yahoo Finance v8 for a given symbol/exchange/range; returns daily candles with 5-min cache.

nodes.label: GET /api/dividends
nodes.summary: Edge route fetching batch dividend data (ex-date, yield, annual div) from Yahoo Finance quoteSummary; falls back to chart dividend events for Indian NSE stocks.

nodes.label: GET /api/fii-dii
nodes.summary: Nodejs route scraping NSE FII/DII data, upserting to Supabase fii_dii_history, returning last 20 trading days; 15-min in-memory and CDN cache.

nodes.label: GET /api/financials
nodes.summary: Edge route calling Yahoo Finance quoteSummary for income statement and balance sheet history; returns normalized income and balance arrays with 1-hr cache.

nodes.label: GET /api/fundamental-scan
nodes.summary: Edge route scanning NSE_SCAN_UNIVERSE (100 stocks) for fundamental metrics (PE, ROE, margins, debt) from Yahoo Finance; 30-min cache.

nodes.label: GET /api/ipo
nodes.summary: Edge route reading from Supabase ipo_calendar table (admin-updated weekly), returning upcoming/open/listed IPOs with 30-min cache.

nodes.label: GET /api/market-mood
nodes.summary: Edge route computing SIGNAL-MMI score (0-100) from 5 inputs: Nifty vs 200 EMA, India VIX, FII 5d flow (Supabase), sector breadth, US VIX; 15-min cache.

nodes.label: GET /api/mf-nav
nodes.summary: Edge route fetching latest NAV from mfapi.in for a given scheme code; 1-hr cache.

nodes.label: GET /api/mf-search
nodes.summary: Edge route searching mutual fund schemes on mfapi.in; returns up to 12 matches with 2-min cache.

nodes.label: GET /api/ml/signals
nodes.summary: Nodejs route scanning 100-stock NSE universe for RSI 42-62 / EMA proximity signals; in-memory cache 1hr; returns top signals sorted by score.

nodes.label: GET /api/ml/signals/[ticker]
nodes.summary: Edge route computing per-stock ML signal (STRONG_BUY/BUY/HOLD/SELL/STRONG_SELL) from RSI14 + EMA20/50/200 + MACD using Yahoo Finance 3mo data; 5-min cache.

nodes.label: GET /api/ml/signals/detail
nodes.summary: Nodejs route merging scan cache with Yahoo Finance 2mo TA (EMA5/20/50, MACD, BB, 52W levels) for detailed stock analysis; 15-min cache.

nodes.label: GET /api/paper-trading/auto-scan
nodes.summary: Vercel Cron (Mon-Fri 9:30 AM IST) Nodejs route that auto-exits and auto-enters paper trades based on strategy signals from 30-stock NSE universe; requires CRON_SECRET.

nodes.label: POST /api/payment/create-order
nodes.summary: Nodejs route creating Razorpay order for starter/pro/elite plans (monthly/annual); checks welcome_discount_pct from Supabase profiles.

nodes.label: POST /api/payment/verify
nodes.summary: Nodejs route verifying Razorpay HMAC-SHA256 signature, updating Supabase profiles.plan + plan_expires_at, and processing referral discounts on paid conversion.

nodes.label: GET /api/peer-compare
nodes.summary: Edge route returning up to 5 sector peers for a given NSE symbol, each with price, PE, ROE, market cap from Yahoo Finance; 5-min cache.

nodes.label: POST /api/plaid/exchange-token
nodes.summary: Exchanges Plaid public token for access token (AES-256-GCM encrypted) and upserts into broker_connections Supabase table.

nodes.label: POST /api/plaid/link-token
nodes.summary: Creates Plaid Link token for US Investments product, scoped to authenticated user; supports OAuth redirect and webhook configuration.

nodes.label: POST /api/plaid/sync
nodes.summary: Syncs Plaid investment holdings into plaid_holdings Supabase table; decrypts access token, calls investmentsHoldingsGet, upserts rows.

nodes.label: POST /api/plaid/webhook
nodes.summary: Nodejs webhook handler for Plaid INVESTMENTS/DEFAULT_UPDATE events; auto-syncs holdings via service role to plaid_holdings table.

nodes.label: POST /api/portfolio-history
nodes.summary: Edge route building portfolio value time series from top-25 holdings by fetching Yahoo Finance OHLCV history; scales to full portfolio cost basis.

nodes.label: GET /api/portfolio-news
nodes.summary: Nodejs route fetching Yahoo Finance news for up to 8 US stock symbols (drops NSE/BSE); 15-min in-memory cache; returns 10 most recent articles.

nodes.label: GET /api/prices
nodes.summary: Edge route batch-fetching current price, change_pct, prev_close from Yahoo Finance v8 for multiple symbols; 3-min CDN cache.

nodes.label: GET /api/push/check-alerts
nodes.summary: Vercel Cron Nodejs route (every 15 min market hours) checking price_alerts table, fetching live prices, sending web-push via VAPID to triggered alert subscribers.

nodes.label: POST /api/push/subscribe
nodes.summary: Nodejs route saving or removing push subscription (endpoint, p256dh, auth) to Supabase push_subscriptions table scoped by user JWT.

nodes.label: GET|POST /api/referral
nodes.summary: Nodejs route managing referral codes; GET returns stats/discount tier; POST records a referral on signup and applies 5% welcome discount to referred user.

nodes.label: POST|GET /api/scan-log
nodes.summary: Nodejs route for scan_log table; POST batch-upserts daily scan entries; GET returns history with per-zone accuracy stats and monthly win rates.

nodes.label: GET /api/scan-log/backfill
nodes.summary: Daily Vercel Cron Nodejs route that backfills price_30d/return_30d and price_60d/return_60d for scan_log rows using Yahoo Finance current prices.

nodes.label: GET /api/sector-data
nodes.summary: Edge route fetching sector index prices from Yahoo Finance for multiple tickers and a given period range (1d/5d/1mo/3mo/1y); 5-min cache.

nodes.label: Yahoo Finance API
nodes.summary: External price data source (v8/chart and v10/quoteSummary) used across most API routes for prices, technicals, fundamentals, and historical OHLCV.

nodes.label: Supabase (anon key)
nodes.summary: Supabase Postgres + Auth backend. Accessed via NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY from browser. Tables used: portfolios, holdings, watchlist, scan_log, push_subscriptions, equity_grants, angel_connections, broker_connections.

nodes.label: Razorpay API
nodes.summary: Payment gateway for Indian subscription payments; order created server-side, verified via HMAC-SHA256 on payment_id + order_id.

nodes.label: Plaid API
nodes.summary: US investment holdings sync for US brokerage accounts via Plaid Investments product; link token → public token → access token (AES-256-GCM encrypted in Supabase).

nodes.label: Angel One SmartAPI
nodes.summary: Indian broker API integration for holdings sync; login via clientcode/password/TOTP, JWT encrypted with AES-256-GCM before storage.

nodes.label: CASParser API
nodes.summary: Third-party API (api.casparser.in/v4) for reading mutual fund CAS statements from email inbox; OAuth-based connection + PDF parsing.

nodes.label: NSE India API
nodes.summary: National Stock Exchange API (nseindia.com) scraped for FII/DII flow data; requires cookie from homepage before hitting /api/fiidiiTradeReact.

nodes.label: mfapi.in
nodes.summary: Free Indian mutual fund NAV and search API used by /api/mf-nav and /api/mf-search routes.

nodes.label: web-push VAPID
nodes.summary: Web Push Protocol via web-push npm package; used by check-alerts cron to send price alert notifications to subscribed browsers.

nodes.label: FOUNDERS constant
nodes.summary: Hardcoded array of founder emails ['gsaiganesh@gmail.com', 'gsai0905@gmail.com', 'bskumar.obiee@gmail.com'] used for admin/plan bypass.

nodes.label: Supabase Table Schema
nodes.summary: Core tables: profiles (plan, plan_expires_at, referral_code), portfolios, holdings (symbol, exchange, qty, avg_price), scan_log, fii_dii_history, push_subscriptions, price_alerts, ipo_calendar, angel_connections (access_token_enc), broker_connections (plaid_access_token), plaid_holdings, equity_grants, referrals, paper_strategies, paper_trades.

nodes.label: AES-256-GCM Token Encryption
nodes.summary: Broker tokens (Angel One JWT, Plaid access token) encrypted with AES-256-GCM before Supabase storage; key from BROKER_ENCRYPTION_KEY / PLAID_TOKEN_ENCRYPTION_KEY env vars.

nodes.label: Plan Tiers (free/starter/pro/elite)
nodes.summary: Subscription plan system: starter ₹299/mo, pro ₹799/mo, elite ₹1999/mo (20% annual discount). Plan stored in profiles.plan. Founders bypass as 'admin'.

nodes.label: Referral Discount System
nodes.summary: Tiered referral discounts (5/10/20/40/80% for 1/2/3/4/5+ paid referrals) tracked in referrals table. Referred users get 5% welcome discount applied at checkout.

nodes.label: SIGNAL-MMI Market Mood Index
nodes.summary: Proprietary composite score (0-100) from 5 weighted inputs: Nifty vs 200 EMA (30%), India VIX (25%), FII 5d flow (20%), sector breadth (15%), US VIX (10%). Zones: Extreme Fear/Fear/Neutral/Greed/Extreme Greed.

nodes.label: CRON_SECRET Auth Pattern
nodes.summary: Vercel Cron endpoints secured via ?secret= query param or x-cron-secret header checked against CRON_SECRET env var.

nodes.label: GET /api/signal-narrative
nodes.summary: Grok-4.3 powered AI narrative for a single NSE signal. Elite tier only. Returns 3-line technical analysis (Catalyst/Risk/Timing) using XAI API.

nodes.label: /api/stock-detail
nodes.summary: Full technical + fundamental detail for a stock. Used by StockDetailSheet and ComparePage.

nodes.label: /api/stock-news
nodes.summary: News feed for a stock symbol. Used by StockNews component in StockPage and StockDetailSheet.

nodes.label: GET /api/stock-search
nodes.summary: Edge route for stock symbol search using Yahoo Finance v1 search API. Filters NSE/BSE/US equities, returns up to 8 results.

nodes.label: GET /api/us/analysis
nodes.summary: Node.js route computing US stock technical indicators (RSI, EMA20, MACD, 52W stats, vol ratio) for up to 20 symbols. Uses in-memory 30-min cache. US_SECTORS hardcoded mapping.

nodes.label: Auth Callback Page
nodes.summary: Client-side OAuth callback page. Exchanges OAuth code for session via Supabase browser client, records referral from localStorage if present, then redirects.

nodes.label: CASParser Callback Page
nodes.summary: OAuth callback for CASParser (MF/ETF Gmail import). Saves inbox_token to sessionStorage then redirects to /dashboard/etf-mf?tab=holdings&cas=1.

nodes.label: AI Prompts Library Page
nodes.summary: Static page with 20 pre-built stock screening prompts across 7 categories (Momentum, Value, Dividends, Technical, Sector, Earnings, Thematic). Copy-to-clipboard only — no live API calls.

nodes.label: Algorithm Library Page
nodes.summary: Library of 6 pre-built trading algorithms (RSI+EMA, Dual EMA, BB Mean Reversion, ORB, Sector Rotation, Volatility Breakout). Uses usePlan to gate Pro content. Deploy tab also gated.

nodes.label: Backtest Page
nodes.summary: Backtest landing page gated by ProGate feature='backtest'. Shows feature cards and 'coming Q3 2026' notice. No data fetch — UI-only placeholder.

nodes.label: Brokers Connect Page
nodes.summary: Broker connection manager. Supports Angel One (SmartAPI) and US Plaid connections. Uses usePortfolio for session. Calls /api/broker/angel/* and /api/plaid/sync routes. Zerodha/Upstox coming soon.

nodes.label: Capital Gains Page
nodes.summary: STCG/LTCG tax estimator for India NSE/BSE holdings. Fetches holdings from Supabase, live prices from /api/prices, computes tax at 15% STCG / 10% LTCG above 1L exemption.

nodes.label: Commodities Tracker Page
nodes.summary: Tracks 6 commodity futures (Gold, Silver, Crude, NG, Copper, Aluminium) as MCX proxies via Yahoo Finance. Uses useTrackerPositions hook (localStorage). Converts USD prices to INR via live USDINR=X rate.

nodes.label: Main Dashboard Page
nodes.summary: Main dashboard with India + US portfolio P&L, market indices, FII/DII, sector performance, watchlist preview, US technical analysis, RSU/ESPP, forex/commodity positions. Complex multi-source data aggregation page.

nodes.label: Dashboard Layout
nodes.summary: Root dashboard layout wrapping all dashboard/* pages. Provides PortfolioProvider, DashboardNavProvider, top nav (DashboardTopNav), sticky sub-nav, and MobileBottomNav.

nodes.label: SignalsPage
nodes.summary: Client signals page with hardcoded mock SIGS data. Filter by buy/sell/hold/momentum/swing, sort by confidence, search. Shows signal cards with CMP/target/stop-loss/R:R.

nodes.label: Paper Trading Page
nodes.summary: Virtual paper trading dashboard. Uses usePortfolio for session and usePlan for gating. Fetches strategies and trades from Supabase. Supports 6 algo presets. Calls /api/prices for current price.

nodes.label: Upgrade Page
nodes.summary: Plan comparison and Razorpay checkout page. Uses usePortfolio and usePlan. Calls /api/payment/create-order and /api/payment/verify. Plans: Free/Starter(₹299)/Pro(₹799)/Elite(₹1999).

nodes.label: Watchlist Page
nodes.summary: Watchlist with price alerts and stock chart. Fetches watchlist and alerts from Supabase. Shows StockChart (dynamic import) and PushSubscribeButton. Calls /api/prices for live prices.

nodes.label: Forex Tracker Page
nodes.summary: Tracks 9 forex pairs vs INR. Uses useTrackerPositions hook (localStorage). Fetches live rates from /api/prices. JPY displayed as per 100 units. Shows position P&L.

nodes.label: Algo Builder Route
nodes.summary: Dashboard route /dashboard/algo-builder serving AlgoBuilderPage.

nodes.label: Root Layout
nodes.summary: Root Next.js layout. Sets PWA metadata, viewport-fit=cover, apple-touch-icon, theme-color. Wraps children in ThemeProvider and adds CapacitorOAuthListener.

nodes.label: ProGate Component
nodes.summary: Plan gating wrapper. Gates features by plan level (algo-builder, backtest, equity-comp require 'pro'). Shows upgrade prompt for non-pro users.

nodes.label: PortfolioProvider
nodes.summary: Context provider for user session, portfolios, active portfolio and India holdings. Used by dashboard layout to wrap all pages.

nodes.label: usePlan hook
nodes.summary: Plan access hook. Returns plan, canAccess(feature), isAdmin. Founders bypass. Used by DashboardSidebar, MobileBottomNav, NavUserChip, ProGate.

nodes.label: usePortfolio (PortfolioProvider context)
nodes.summary: Portfolio context hook providing user, session, portfolios, activePortfolio, holdings, loading, createPortfolio, setActiveId.

nodes.label: useTrackerPositions Hook
nodes.summary: Generic hook for managing localStorage-persisted tracker positions (forex, commodity). Takes type and storageKey parameters.

nodes.label: MobileBottomNav
nodes.summary: Mobile bottom navigation with 4 primary tabs and a More drawer showing all dashboard pages.

nodes.label: DashboardTopNav
nodes.summary: Top navigation tabs component for dashboard. Includes DashboardSubNav for secondary navigation strip.

nodes.label: ThemeToggle
nodes.summary: Dark/light theme toggle button used in dashboard top nav.

nodes.label: NavUserChip
nodes.summary: User avatar/email chip in the top nav right side.

nodes.label: MarketBrief
nodes.summary: Market open/closed badge, index snapshot, FII/DII summary, narrative widget shown on main dashboard.

nodes.label: MarketMoodIndex
nodes.summary: Gauge component showing market sentiment. Shown on main dashboard.

nodes.label: TreemapHeatmap
nodes.summary: Treemap / portfolio heatmap component used on main dashboard page.

nodes.label: StockDetailSheet
nodes.summary: Detail drawer/sheet for a stock shown on main dashboard when a holding is clicked.

nodes.label: StockNews
nodes.summary: News widget imported in signals page. Likely wraps /api/stock-news calls.

nodes.label: StockChart
nodes.summary: Recharts candlestick + EMA overlay chart. Dynamically imported (ssr:false) in watchlist page.

nodes.label: PushSubscribeButton
nodes.summary: Subscribe/unsubscribe push notification button. Used in watchlist page header.

nodes.label: PlaidLinkButton
nodes.summary: Plaid Link button for US broker connection. Used in brokers page.

nodes.label: ThemeProvider
nodes.summary: Theme context provider wrapping all pages in root layout.

nodes.label: CapacitorOAuthListener
nodes.summary: Listens for Capacitor deep-link OAuth callbacks for iOS app. Included in root layout.

nodes.label: Yahoo Finance v8 Chart API
nodes.summary: Yahoo Finance v8 chart endpoint. Used by /api/stock-detail and /api/us/analysis for OHLCV data (3-month range). No API key required.

nodes.label: Yahoo Finance v10 quoteSummary API
nodes.summary: Yahoo Finance quoteSummary endpoint. Used by /api/stock-detail to fetch fundamentals, analyst targets, earnings dates, shareholding breakdown.

nodes.label: xAI Grok API
nodes.summary: xAI chat completions API at api.x.ai/v1/chat/completions. Used by /api/signal-narrative with grok-4.3 model for AI stock narratives.

nodes.label: Google News RSS
nodes.summary: Google News RSS search feed. Used by /api/stock-news to fetch stock-specific news articles.

nodes.label: Yahoo Finance v1 Search API
nodes.summary: Yahoo Finance search endpoint at /v1/finance/search. Used by /api/stock-search for autocomplete.

nodes.label: ProGate Plan Gating Pattern
nodes.summary: Pattern where pages wrap content in <ProGate feature='...'> to enforce plan level requirements. Used on algo-builder, backtest, equity-comp pages.

nodes.label: MCX Proxy Commodity Pricing
nodes.summary: Commodity prices from COMEX/NYMEX futures (Yahoo Finance) converted to INR using live USDINR=X rate. Gold per 10g, Silver per kg, Copper/Aluminium per kg (lbs→kg). Labeled as proxy, not official MCX.

nodes.label: STCG/LTCG Tax Classification
nodes.summary: Holdings held < 1 year classified as STCG (15% flat), >= 1 year as LTCG (10% above Rs 1L exemption). Requires purchase_date column in holdings table.

nodes.label: US Sector Mapping
nodes.summary: Hardcoded US_SECTORS Record<string, string> mapping ~80 US symbols to sector names (Technology, Financials, Healthcare, etc.). Used in /api/us/analysis for sector breakdown.

nodes.label: Supertrend Indicator
nodes.summary: Custom Supertrend implementation (period=10, mult=3, Wilder smoothed ATR) computed in /api/stock-detail. Returns value (trailing stop) and direction (1=bullish/-1=bearish).

nodes.label: Risk Disclosure Page (new)
nodes.summary: Full-featured risk disclosure page at /risk-disclosure using PublicNav component. Covers SEBI non-registration, nature of content, limitations.

nodes.label: Risk Page (legacy)
nodes.summary: Older risk disclosure page at /risk with inline styling. More detailed (11 sections) including DPDP Act. Used from DashboardSidebar.

nodes.label: Robots.ts
nodes.summary: robots.txt generator: disallows /dashboard/ and /api/, allows everything else. Points to sitemap.

nodes.label: SectorStocksClient
nodes.summary: Client component for sector stock table: fetches prices via /api/prices, shows sortable table with change%, top gainer/loser. Takes stocks[] and sectorLabel props.

nodes.label: SectorPage ([sector])
nodes.summary: ISR page (revalidate=300) for /sectors/[sector]. Uses generateStaticParams from SECTORS lib, generates SEO metadata, renders SectorStocksClient.

nodes.label: SectorsIndexPage
nodes.summary: Static page at /sectors listing 14 sector cards with icons, linking to each /sectors/[slug] page.

nodes.label: SignInPage
nodes.summary: Client-side auth page with multiple screens: signin/signup/magic-link/password-reset. Supports Google/Twitter OAuth, email+password, magic link. Uses Supabase client SDK.

nodes.label: Sign-Out Route
nodes.summary: GET route that calls supabase.auth.signOut() and redirects to /sign-in.

nodes.label: sitemap.ts
nodes.summary: Dynamic sitemap generator covering home, /sectors, /stocks/compare, top 40 NSE stock pages, and all sector pages.

nodes.label: StockPage ([symbol])
nodes.summary: ISR server page (revalidate=300) for /stocks/[symbol]. Pre-generates top 40 NSE stocks. Shows price, fundamentals, signals, chart, financials, news. Uses fetchStockDetail.

nodes.label: ComparePage
nodes.summary: Client page /stocks/compare. Reads ?a=&b= params, fetches /api/stock-detail for both, renders side-by-side price, RSI, EMA, signals, StockChartWrapper.

nodes.label: TrackRecordPage (stub)
nodes.summary: Placeholder component returning "Track Record — coming soon." No real implementation yet.

nodes.label: capacitor.config.ts
nodes.summary: Capacitor iOS config: appId=com.signal.app, server.url=Vercel live URL, dark bg #070D1A, portrait-only, PushNotifications + SplashScreen plugins.

nodes.label: Brand (BrandIcon, BrandMark)
nodes.summary: Reusable brand SVG icon (polyline signal chart + purple orbit) and BrandMark wordmark wrapper with optional Link.

nodes.label: CapacitorOAuthListener
nodes.summary: Client component that listens to Capacitor appUrlOpen events for OAuth callbacks (com.gsaiganesh.signal.app://auth/callback), exchanges code for Supabase session.

nodes.label: DashboardNavContext
nodes.summary: Context + provider for dashboard tab navigation. Defines TABS structure (Home/Tools/Markets/Account), resolveTab(), DashboardNavProvider.

nodes.label: DashboardSidebar
nodes.summary: Left sidebar nav with 4 tabs (Home/Tools/Markets/Account), each with icon links. Uses usePlan().isAdmin for Admin Console link. Hidden on mobile.

nodes.label: DashboardTopNav + DashboardSubNav
nodes.summary: Top tab bar and sub-nav row reading TABS from DashboardNavContext. Tab click navigates to first link in tab.

nodes.label: DividendTracker
nodes.summary: Accordion component for dividend data. Takes holdings[], fetches /api/dividends on open, shows ex-date, yield, annual income per holding.

nodes.label: FinancialsSection
nodes.summary: Lazy accordion for financial statements. Fetches /api/financials on open. Shows P&L tab (revenue, gross, EBIT, net) and Balance Sheet tab (assets, liab, equity, debt, cash, D/E).

nodes.label: MarketBrief
nodes.summary: Dashboard widget fetching /api/prices (NIFTY, SENSEX, BANKNIFTY, DOW, GOLD, CRUDE) and /api/fii-dii. Shows indices, FII/DII, generated narrative text, market open/closed badge.

nodes.label: MarketMoodIndex (SIGNAL-MMI)
nodes.summary: Bento card widget fetching /api/market-mood every 15 min. Renders semicircular gauge + horizontal bars for 5 sub-scores: momentum, FII/DII, VIX, breadth, delivery.

nodes.label: MobileBottomNav
nodes.summary: Mobile-only bottom nav with 4 primary tabs (Home/Scan/Portfolio/Watchlist) + More drawer. More drawer has Markets/Tools/Account/Admin sections with 2-col grid. Uses ThemeProvider and usePlan.

nodes.label: NavUserChip
nodes.summary: Top-right user avatar dropdown showing initials, plan badge, menu items (Notifications, Upgrade Plan, Refer & Earn, Admin Console for isAdmin) and Sign Out.

nodes.label: OnboardingChecklist
nodes.summary: Getting-started checklist with 6 steps (signup, portfolio, holdings, signals, paper trading, track record). Tracks completion in localStorage, dismissable.

nodes.label: PlaidLinkButton
nodes.summary: Plaid Link integration. Fetches /api/plaid/link-token on mount, handles OAuth redirect return, exchanges public_token via /api/plaid/exchange-token.

nodes.label: PortfolioChart
nodes.summary: Lightweight-charts line chart for portfolio value over time. Fetches /api/portfolio-history (POST with holdings + range). Shows value line (green/red) and invested baseline (yellow dashed).

nodes.label: PortfolioRiskCard
nodes.summary: Static diversification score card. Computes score from stock count, sector count, top holding %, top 3 weight. Shows sector bar chart (top 5) and best/worst performer.

nodes.label: PortfolioShareCard
nodes.summary: Off-screen card (800x450) captured via html-to-image. Supports Web Share API for mobile and download fallback. Shows P&L, invested, top 5 holdings.

nodes.label: PortfolioSwitcher
nodes.summary: Dropdown to switch active portfolio from context. Can create new portfolios inline. Uses usePortfolio context.

nodes.label: ProGate + PlanBadge
nodes.summary: Feature gating wrapper. Reads canAccess(feature) from usePlan. Shows upgrade CTA if locked. PlanBadge shows tier label inline. Supports 12 named features.

nodes.label: PublicNav
nodes.summary: Sticky public navigation bar with logo, nav links (Scanner/Portfolio/Algo Builder/Pricing/Track Record/About), ThemeToggle, Sign In, and Get Started CTA.

nodes.label: PushSubscribeButton
nodes.summary: Button to subscribe/unsubscribe push notifications. Uses usePushNotifications hook with accessToken. Registers /sw.js service worker on mount.

nodes.label: StockChart
nodes.summary: Lightweight-charts candlestick chart with volume histogram. Fetches /api/chart-data. Optional EMA20 (blue) and EMA50 (yellow) overlays. Range selector: 1M/3M/6M/1Y.

nodes.label: StockChartWrapper
nodes.summary: Client boundary wrapper for StockChart using dynamic import with ssr:false. Allows embedding in server pages.

nodes.label: StockDetailSheet
nodes.summary: Full-screen modal overlay showing comprehensive stock data. Accepts HoldingContext prop for P&L display. Fetches /api/stock-detail. Sections: Signals, Technicals, Price Levels, Valuation, Growth, Analyst, Dividend, Shareholding, News.

nodes.label: HoldingContext interface
nodes.summary: Props interface for StockDetailSheet holding: qty, avgPrice, currency (INR|USD), portfolioName, usdInr, mlBadge, mlSignal, isEtf, onDelete callback.

nodes.label: StockNews
nodes.summary: Fetches /api/stock-news?symbol=&exchange=&name= and renders news list with title, publisher, relative timestamp. Used in both StockPage and StockDetailSheet.

nodes.label: ThemeProvider + useTheme
nodes.summary: Context provider persisting dark/light theme to localStorage and data-theme attribute. Default: dark. Exports useTheme() hook.

nodes.label: /api/prices
nodes.summary: Batch price fetcher via Yahoo Finance. Used by SectorStocksClient and MarketBrief.

nodes.label: /api/fii-dii
nodes.summary: FII/DII net flow data endpoint. Used by MarketBrief.

nodes.label: /api/financials
nodes.summary: 4-5yr annual P&L and balance sheet. Used by FinancialsSection (lazy accordion).

nodes.label: /api/chart-data
nodes.summary: OHLCV candle data for StockChart component.

nodes.label: /api/dividends
nodes.summary: Dividend yield, ex-date, annual div/share for portfolio holdings. Used by DividendTracker.

nodes.label: /api/portfolio-history
nodes.summary: POST endpoint returning portfolio value time-series for PortfolioChart.

nodes.label: /api/market-mood
nodes.summary: SIGNAL-MMI endpoint returning score, zone, zoneColor, hint, and 5 subScores (momentum, FII, VIX, breadth, delivery).

nodes.label: /api/plaid/link-token
nodes.summary: Creates Plaid link_token for broker connection. Used by PlaidLinkButton.

nodes.label: /api/plaid/exchange-token
nodes.summary: Exchanges Plaid public_token for access_token. Used by PlaidLinkButton after success.

nodes.label: usePushNotifications hook
nodes.summary: Push notification subscription state machine. Used by PushSubscribeButton with accessToken.

nodes.label: lib/sectors.ts (SECTORS, SLUG_MAP)
nodes.summary: 14 NSE sector definitions with slugs, labels, descriptions, and stock lists. Used by sitemap, SectorPage, SectorsIndexPage.

nodes.label: fetchStockDetail
nodes.summary: Server-side data fetcher for stock detail page (ISR). Fetches Yahoo Finance chart + quoteSummary in parallel. Returns full technical + fundamental object.

nodes.label: Supabase client (lib/supabase/client)
nodes.summary: Client-side Supabase instance used for auth operations (signInWithOAuth, signInWithPassword, signUp, signOut, signInWithOtp, exchangeCodeForSession).

nodes.label: Supabase server (lib/supabase/server)
nodes.summary: Server-side Supabase instance used in route handlers for auth operations.

nodes.label: ProGate feature keys
nodes.summary: 12 feature keys: signals-unlimited, signals-detail, signals-portfolio, signals-custom-universe, signals-us, signals-ai-narrative, us-portfolio-multi, algo-builder, backtest, equity-comp, paper-trading-full, track-record, admin.

nodes.label: SIGNAL-MMI Scoring
nodes.summary: 5-input proprietary market mood index: momentum (Nifty %), FII/DII net, VIX, advance/decline breadth, delivery percentage. Weighted score 0-100 with zones and colors.

nodes.label: ISR Sector Pages
nodes.summary: Sector pages use ISR with revalidate=300 and generateStaticParams from SECTORS. Client component handles live prices separately.

nodes.label: Capacitor OAuth Flow
nodes.summary: iOS OAuth uses custom URL scheme com.gsaiganesh.signal.app://auth/callback. CapacitorOAuthListener handles appUrlOpen, exchanges code via Supabase.

nodes.label: ThemeToggle
nodes.summary: Client component button that calls useTheme() from ThemeProvider to toggle light/dark mode.

nodes.label: TreemapHeatmap
nodes.summary: Client component that renders a squarified treemap heatmap of stock symbols, with colour-coded tiles by changePct and a legend bar showing up/flat/down counts.

nodes.label: global.d.ts
nodes.summary: Ambient module declaration for CSS modules, mapping class names to strings.

nodes.label: lib/api.ts
nodes.summary: Client-side API wrapper that proxies requests to /api/ml for live quotes, market indices, and market regime data from the ML backend.

nodes.label: LiveQuote
nodes.summary: Interface for a live stock quote including price, change_pct, bias (bullish/bearish/neutral), confidence, signal (BUY/SELL/HOLD/STRONG_BUY/STRONG_SELL), and RSI.

nodes.label: MarketIndices
nodes.summary: Interface mapping index names (NIFTY50, SENSEX, BANKNIFTY, NIFTYIT) to MarketIndex objects with price/change/change_pct.

nodes.label: fetchQuote()
nodes.summary: Fetches a LiveQuote for a given symbol from /api/ml/signals/{symbol}.

nodes.label: fetchMarketIndices()
nodes.summary: Fetches MarketIndices from /api/ml/market/indices.

nodes.label: fetchMarketRegime()
nodes.summary: Fetches current market regime and sentiment string from /api/ml/market/regime.

nodes.label: lib/fetchStockDetail.ts
nodes.summary: Server-side utility that fetches Yahoo Finance chart (1y) + quoteSummary in parallel, computes RSI14 and EMA20/50/200, and returns a StockDetail object with technicals and fundamentals.

nodes.label: StockDetail
nodes.summary: Interface for full stock detail: price, RSI, EMAs, 52-week high/low, signals array, and fundamentals (PE, PB, market cap, div yield, EV/EBITDA, ROE, revenue growth, margins, D/E, beta).

nodes.label: fetchStockDetail()
nodes.summary: Async function that fetches Yahoo Finance v8 chart + v10 quoteSummary in parallel (revalidate 300s), computes technicals, and returns StockDetail.

nodes.label: calcEma()
nodes.summary: Computes Exponential Moving Average for a given period over a price array.

nodes.label: calcRsi()
nodes.summary: Computes RSI14 (Wilder smoothing) from a closing price array.

nodes.label: lib/fundamental-scan-types.ts
nodes.summary: Defines FundStock type and NSE_SCAN_UNIVERSE array of ~80 NSE stocks across 13 sectors for fundamental scanning.

nodes.label: FundStock
nodes.summary: Type for a fundamentally-scanned stock: symbol, sector, name, price, change_pct, PE, PB, ROE, margins, D/E, revenue growth, market cap, dividend yield.

nodes.label: NSE_SCAN_UNIVERSE
nodes.summary: Exported array of ~80 NSE stock symbols with sector tags spanning IT, Banking, Finance, Auto, Pharma, FMCG, Metals, Energy, Realty, Telecom, Consumer, Cement, Infra, Hospital, Diversified.

nodes.label: lib/portfolio-context.tsx
nodes.summary: PortfolioProvider React context that manages Supabase auth state, fetches portfolios and holdings via Supabase REST API, and exposes CRUD operations (create/rename/delete portfolio, switch active portfolio).

nodes.label: PortfolioProvider
nodes.summary: React context provider wrapping the app; uses Supabase onAuthStateChange to load portfolios+holdings and provides setActiveId, createPortfolio, renamePortfolio, deletePortfolio via context.

nodes.label: usePortfolio()
nodes.summary: Custom hook to consume PortfolioCtx; throws if used outside PortfolioProvider.

nodes.label: PortfolioCtx
nodes.summary: Context shape: user, session, portfolios[], activeId, activePortfolio, setActiveId, holdings[], symbols[], loading, refresh, createPortfolio, renamePortfolio, deletePortfolio.

nodes.label: restFetch()
nodes.summary: Internal helper that calls Supabase REST API with Bearer token and apikey headers, returning parsed JSON.

nodes.label: lib/sectors.ts
nodes.summary: Defines SECTORS array of 14 SectorDef objects (banking, IT, pharma, auto, FMCG, oil-gas, metal, infra, power, nbfc, consumer, cement, realty, telecom) and SLUG_MAP lookup.

nodes.label: SectorDef
nodes.summary: Interface with label, slug, description, and stocks[] (NSE symbols) for a market sector.

nodes.label: SECTORS
nodes.summary: Exported array of 14 SectorDef objects covering all major NSE sectors; used by sector pages and PortfolioRiskCard.

nodes.label: SLUG_MAP
nodes.summary: Record<string, SectorDef> built from SECTORS for O(1) slug-based lookup of sector definitions.

nodes.label: lib/supabase/client.ts
nodes.summary: Browser-side Supabase client factory using createBrowserClient from @supabase/ssr with NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY.

nodes.label: lib/supabase/server.ts
nodes.summary: Server-side Supabase client factory using createServerClient from @supabase/ssr; wires Next.js cookies() for SSR session management.

nodes.label: lib/supabase/types.ts
nodes.summary: TypeScript type definitions: Plan, MlClass, SignalType, TradeStatus, PaperTradeStatus, and the full Database interface for all Supabase tables.

nodes.label: Plan
nodes.summary: Union type: 'free' | 'starter' | 'pro' | 'elite' | 'admin'. Stored in profiles.plan column.

nodes.label: MlClass
nodes.summary: Union type for ML classification: 'Momentum' | 'Swing' | 'Accumulate' | 'Hold' | 'Exit' | 'Dead' | 'Watch'.

nodes.label: Database
nodes.summary: Supabase Database interface covering tables: profiles, portfolios, holdings, watchlists, strategies, paper_trades, paper_trade_logs, broker_connections, plaid_holdings.

nodes.label: profiles (table)
nodes.summary: Supabase table for user profiles: id, email, full_name, avatar_url, plan (Plan type), plan_expires_at, broker, created_at, updated_at.

nodes.label: portfolios (table)
nodes.summary: Supabase table: id, user_id, name, broker, created_at. One user can have many portfolios.

nodes.label: holdings (table)
nodes.summary: Supabase table: id, portfolio_id, user_id, symbol, exchange, qty, avg_price, purchase_date, ml_class (MlClass), created_at, updated_at.

nodes.label: lib/use-plan.ts
nodes.summary: usePlan hook: reads user session, bypasses DB for FOUNDERS (gives admin plan), otherwise fetches plan from profiles table. Exposes canAccess(feature) and convenience booleans.

nodes.label: usePlan()
nodes.summary: Hook returning plan, email, loading, isFounder, isAdmin, isElite, isPro, isStarter, canAccess(feature), meetsMinPlan(min). Founders (3 hardcoded emails) always get admin plan.

nodes.label: FOUNDERS
nodes.summary: Hardcoded array of 3 founder emails that always receive admin-tier plan access, bypassing DB lookup.

nodes.label: PLAN_GATES
nodes.summary: Record mapping PlanFeature keys to arrays of Plan values that can access them. Governs feature gating across the app.

nodes.label: PlanFeature
nodes.summary: Union type of all gated feature keys: signals-unlimited, signals-detail, signals-us, us-portfolio-multi, algo-builder, backtest, equity-comp, paper-trading-full, track-record, admin, etc.

nodes.label: lib/use-tracker-positions.ts
nodes.summary: Generic hook for managing forex/commodity tracker positions. Syncs to Supabase tracker_positions table when logged in, falls back to localStorage for anonymous users.

nodes.label: useTrackerPositions()
nodes.summary: Generic hook parameterised by type ('forex'|'commodity') and lsKey. Returns positions[], loading, addPosition, deletePosition, reload.

nodes.label: lib/usePushNotifications.ts
nodes.summary: Hook managing Web Push subscription lifecycle: checks ServiceWorker + PushManager support, subscribes/unsubscribes via /api/push/subscribe, returns PushState.

nodes.label: usePushNotifications()
nodes.summary: Hook taking accessToken; manages push subscription state machine (unsupported/denied/subscribed/unsubscribed/loading). Calls VAPID subscribe via PushManager and POSTs to /api/push/subscribe.

nodes.label: PushState
nodes.summary: Union type: 'unsupported' | 'denied' | 'subscribed' | 'unsubscribed' | 'loading'.

nodes.label: next.config.ts
nodes.summary: Next.js config: standalone output, transpiles @signal/ui and @signal/api-client packages, rewrites /api/ml/:path* to ML_API_URL (default http://localhost:8000).

nodes.label: /api/ml/* rewrite
nodes.summary: Next.js rewrite rule proxying /api/ml/:path* to ML_API_URL env var (Python FastAPI ML backend).

nodes.label: vercel.json
nodes.summary: Vercel deployment config: 3 cron jobs — scan-log/backfill daily at 12:00 UTC, paper-trading/auto-scan weekdays at 04:00 UTC, push/check-alerts weekdays at 04:00 UTC.

nodes.label: Cron: /api/scan-log/backfill
nodes.summary: Vercel cron job at 0 12 * * * (daily noon UTC) to backfill 30/60-day outcomes in scan_log table.

nodes.label: Cron: /api/paper-trading/auto-scan
nodes.summary: Vercel cron job at 0 4 * * 1-5 (weekdays) to auto-scan for paper trading signals.

nodes.label: Cron: /api/push/check-alerts
nodes.summary: Vercel cron job at 0 4 * * 1-5 (weekdays) to check price alerts and send push notifications.

nodes.label: public/sw.js
nodes.summary: Service worker that handles push events (shows notification with title, body, icon, tag) and notificationclick events (focuses or opens /dashboard URL).

nodes.label: public/manifest.json
nodes.summary: PWA manifest for 'SignalGenie': start_url=/dashboard, display=standalone, dark theme (#0E1628), portrait-primary, three icon sizes (SVG, 192px, 512px).

nodes.label: package.json
nodes.summary: signal-web package dependencies: Next.js 15.5, React 19, @supabase/ssr + supabase-js, Capacitor (iOS/Android), web-push, xlsx, plaid, lightweight-charts, html-to-image.

nodes.label: AppDelegate.swift
nodes.summary: Capacitor iOS AppDelegate boilerplate: delegates URL open and universal link handling to ApplicationDelegateProxy for Capacitor plugin routing.

nodes.label: tracker_positions (table)
nodes.summary: Supabase table (SQL in use-tracker-positions.ts): id, user_id, type ('forex'|'commodity'), data jsonb, created_at. RLS: users own their rows.

nodes.label: /api/push/subscribe
nodes.summary: API route called by usePushNotifications hook to save or remove Web Push subscription using user JWT and service role key.

nodes.label: ML API Backend
nodes.summary: External Python FastAPI service at ML_API_URL providing /api/signals, /api/market/indices, /api/market/regime endpoints; proxied through /api/ml/* rewrite.

nodes.label: Yahoo Finance API
nodes.summary: External API used by fetchStockDetail: v8/finance/chart for OHLCV (1y range) and v10/finance/quoteSummary for fundamentals (summaryDetail, defaultKeyStatistics, financialData modules).

nodes.label: ThemeProvider
nodes.summary: Provides useTheme() hook consumed by ThemeToggle (defined in separate ThemeProvider.tsx file).
